nodes.name: Get All Clients from SuiteDash
nodes.notes: SETUP: Create HTTP Header Auth credential with headers X-Public-ID and X-Secret-Key from SuiteDash

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ action: 'process_reminders', deadlineGroup: 'llcs', entityIds: $json.entityIds, year: new Date().getFullYear() }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ from: 'PA CROP Services ', to: $json.email, subject: '⚠️ ' + $json.entityName + ' — Annual Report Due in ' + $json.daysBeforeDeadline + ' Days', html: '

Annual Report Reminder

Hi,

Your ' + $json.entityName + ' (' + $json.entityType + ') annual report is due ' + $json.deadline + ' — that\'s ' + $json.daysUntilDeadline + ' days from now.

' + ($json.filingMethod === 'MANAGED' ? '

✅ Good news: Your plan includes filing. We\'ll handle it — just make sure your entity details are current in your portal.

' : '

File online at file.dos.pa.gov using your PA DOS entity number. The fee is $7.

') + '

Missing this deadline could eventually lead to administrative action. Learn about the 2027 enforcement timeline.

— PA CROP Services
pacropservices.com · 814-228-2822

' }) }}

nodes.name: Send Reminder Email via Emailit
nodes.notes: SETUP: Set EMAILIT_API_KEY in n8n environment variables

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ action: 'reminder_sent', entityId: $json.entityId, year: new Date().getFullYear(), daysBeforeDeadline: $json.daysBeforeDeadline, channel: 'email' }) }}
